---
# Outbound connections grouped by process (beacon candidates)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Which process talked to which destinations. `event_type = ENUM.NETWORK`, group by `actor_process_image_name` with `count()` and `values(action_remote_ip)` to get the distinct destination set per process in one pass. A process with many connections to one IP at a steady rate is a beaconing candidate; pivot into the cadence hunt to confirm.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_remote_ip != null
| comp count() as conns, values(action_remote_ip) as dsts by actor_process_image_name
| sort desc conns
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (narrow 30-min window); measured ~0.0005 CU. Narrow the time window + filter early to keep real-dataset hunts cheap._
